prompt:
Create a Python script called custom_metadata.py that uses the pxr library to demonstrate USD's extensibility features. The script must create a file called pipeline.usda containing:

1. Default prim /Project
2. /Project has custom metadata via SetCustomDataByKey: "pipeline:version" = "2.1", "pipeline:department" = "lighting"
3. /Project has assetInfo with name="hero_asset" and identifier="assets/hero/v003/hero.usd"
4. /Project/Hero — an Xform with purpose set to "render" (UsdGeom.Tokens.render)
5. /Project/Hero/Proxy — an Xform with purpose set to "proxy" (UsdGeom.Tokens.proxy)
6. /Project/Hero/Guide — an Xform with purpose set to "guide" (UsdGeom.Tokens.guide)
7. /Project/Hero has custom properties:
   - "custom:shotName" as a string property with value "SH010"
   - "custom:frameRange" as a Int2 property with value (1001, 1100)
8. /Project/Hero should have UsdGeom.ModelAPI applied with kind set to "component"

Use: from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, Sdf, Gf, Kind

2. /Project has custom metadata via SetCustomDataByKey: "pipeline:version" = "2.1", "pipeline:department" = "lighting"
3. /Project has assetInfo with name="hero_asset" and identifier="assets/hero/v003/hero.usd"
4. /Project/Hero — an Xform with purpose set to "render"
5. /Project/Hero/Proxy — an Xform with purpose set to "proxy"
6. /Project/Hero/Guide — an Xform with purpose set to "guide"

   - "custom:shotName" as a string property with value "SH010"
   - "custom:frameRange" as a Int2 property with value (1001, 1100)
8. /Project/Hero should have UsdGeom.ModelAPI applied with kind set to "component"

The skill reference shows me exactly how to do all of this. Let me write the script.
Now I'll create the Python script with all the required USD extensibility features.

{
  "file_path": "/private/var/folders/k0/jp_x85zj55nf3ssm76z3dmmh0000gn/T/llm-bench-3dknn7dq/custom_metadata.py",
  "content": "#!/usr/bin/env python
"""
USD Extensibility Demo - Custom Metadata, Asset Info, Purpose, and Properties

This script demonstrates USD's extensibility features including:
- Custom metadata via SetCustomDataByKey
- Asset information
- Geometric purpose (render, proxy, guide)
- Custom properties with various types
- Model kind hierarchy
"""

from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, Sdf, Gf, Kind


def create_pipeline_usd():
    """Create a USD file demonstrating extensibility features."""

    # Create a new stage with the output file
    stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("pipeline.usda")

    # 1. Create the default prim /Project
    project_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project", "Xform")
    stage.SetDefaultPrim(project_prim)

    # 2. Set custom metadata on /Project
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:version", "2.1")
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:department", "lighting")

    # 3. Set assetInfo on /Project
    model_api = Usd.ModelAPI(project_prim)
    model_api.SetAssetInfoByKey("name", "hero_asset")
    model_api.SetAssetInfoByKey("identifier", Sdf.AssetPath("assets/hero/v003/hero.usd"))

    # 4. Create /Project/Hero with purpose "render"
    hero_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero", "Xform")
    hero_imageable = UsdGeom.Imageable(hero_prim)
    hero_imageable.GetPurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.render)

    # 7. Add custom properties to /Project/Hero
    hero_prim.CreateAttribute("custom:shotName", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.String).Set("SH010")
    hero_prim.CreateAttribute("custom:frameRange", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Int2).Set(Gf.Vec2i(1001, 1100))

    # 8. Apply UsdGeom.ModelAPI to /Project/Hero and set kind to "component"
    hero_model_api = Usd.ModelAPI(hero_prim)
    hero_model_api.SetKind(Kind.Tokens.component)

    # 5. Create /Project/Hero/Proxy with purpose "proxy"
    proxy_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Proxy", "Xform")
    proxy_imageable = UsdGeom.Imageable(proxy_prim)
    proxy_imageable.GetPurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.proxy)

    # 6. Create /Project/Hero/Guide with purpose "guide"
    guide_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Guide", "Xform")
    guide_imageable = UsdGeom.Imageable(guide_prim)
    guide_imageable.GetPurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.guide)

    # Save the stage
    stage.GetRootLayer().Save()

    print("Created pipeline.usda successfully!")
    print("\nStage contents:")
    print(stage.GetRootLayer().ExportToString())


if __name__ == "__main__":
    create_pipeline_usd()
"

files.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python
"""
USD Extensibility Demo - Custom Metadata, Asset Info, Purpose, and Properties

This script demonstrates USD's extensibility features including:
- Custom metadata via SetCustomDataByKey
- Asset information
- Geometric purpose (render, proxy, guide)
- Custom properties with various types
- Model kind hierarchy
"""

from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, Sdf, Gf, Kind


def create_pipeline_usd():
    """Create a USD file demonstrating extensibility features."""

    # Create a new stage with the output file
    stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("pipeline.usda")

    # 1. Create the default prim /Project
    project_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project", "Xform")
    stage.SetDefaultPrim(project_prim)

    # 2. Set custom metadata on /Project
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:version", "2.1")
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:department", "lighting")

    # 3. Set assetInfo on /Project
    model_api = Usd.ModelAPI(project_prim)
    model_api.SetAssetInfo({
        "name": "hero_asset",
        "identifier": Sdf.AssetPath("assets/hero/v003/hero.usd")
    })

    # 4. Create /Project/Hero with purpose "render"
    hero_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero", "Xform")
    hero_imageable = UsdGeom.Imageable(hero_prim)
    hero_imageable.GetPurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.render)

    # 7. Add custom properties to /Project/Hero
    hero_prim.CreateAttribute("custom:shotName", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.String).Set("SH010")
    hero_prim.CreateAttribute("custom:frameRange", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Int2).Set(Gf.Vec2i(1001, 1100))

    # 8. Apply UsdGeom.ModelAPI to /Project/Hero and set kind to "component"
    hero_model_api = Usd.ModelAPI(hero_prim)
    hero_model_api.SetKind(Kind.Tokens.component)

    # 5. Create /Project/Hero/Proxy with purpose "proxy"
    proxy_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Proxy", "Xform")
    proxy_imageable = UsdGeom.Imageable(proxy_prim)
    proxy_imageable.GetPurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.proxy)

    # 6. Create /Project/Hero/Guide with purpose "guide"
    guide_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Guide", "Xform")
    guide_imageable = UsdGeom.Imageable(guide_prim)
    guide_imageable.GetPurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.guide)

    # Save the stage
    stage.GetRootLayer().Save()

    print("Created pipeline.usda successfully!")
    print("\nStage contents:")
    print(stage.GetRootLayer().ExportToString())


if __name__ == "__main__":
    create_pipeline_usd()
